caption:
The 3 words to say when the phone goes — and it's not 'hello'.

1) '[Business], how can I help?' 2) Get the job before the name. 3) Book before you hang up — offer two slots, never 'I'll call back'.

Can't answer every call yourself? That's what we fix. Free audit — link in bio. 👇 Save this.
